name: Stefado of Beef and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Stew Meat Trimmed 1 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil and peel the pearl onions and garlic cloves.
2. In a large pot, brown the stew meat cubes on medium heat until fully cooked through.
3. Add tomato paste and stir to combine.
4. Sprinkle in dried oregano, cinnamon, ground cumin, sugar, salt, and pepper.
5. Pour in dry white wine and red wine vinegar, stirring to incorporate.
6. Add chopped parsley, pearl onions, and garlic cloves.
7. Place bay leaf on top of the mixture.
8. Stir in crumbled feta cheese and walnuts.
9. Cook over low heat until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
10. Adjust seasoning as needed before serving.
